Name: Website

Name: C# General
Memo: Event communication, network protocols, and base libraries

Children.Memo: Lightweight inter-process event bus based on TCP Socket

Children.Memo: In-process event bus with Command, Query, and multiple IOC scenarios

Children.Name: CodeWF.NetWeaver
Children.Memo: Core network packet serialization library and TCP/UDP wrapper foundation

Name: Avalonia

Children.Memo: General controls and theme package for Avalonia 12

Children.Name: CodeWF.LogViewer
Children.Memo: Lightweight logging library and Avalonia log viewer control

Children.Name: Lang.Avalonia
Children.Memo: Pluggable localization library for Avalonia UI

Children.Name: CodeWF.Markdown
Children.Memo: Avalonia Markdown rendering control and typography themes

Children.Memo: Modular cross-platform desktop toolbox based on Avalonia + Prism

Children.Name: Zhijian
